parameters.notice: Replace this placeholder with a Gmail, Microsoft, or IMAP fetch node inside n8n. Keep mailbox access inside n8n. Pass only bounded message metadata to the next node.

nodes.name: Fetch Provider Mail Placeholder
nodes.notes: Swap for Gmail/Microsoft/IMAP. Do not pass raw headers or mailbox access material downstream.

nodes.name: Normalize BotFucker Payload
nodes.notes: Emits BotFucker webhook-contract JSON only: id, threadId, from, subject, snippet, receivedAt, provider, source.

nodes.name: Convert Normalized JSON To File
nodes.notes: Converts the normalized JSON item into binary field data so Read/Write Files can write a real JSON file.

nodes.name: Write n8n-messages.json
nodes.notes: Writes the binary JSON file generated by Convert Normalized JSON To File.

nodes.name: Import Into Local Review Queue
nodes.notes: Local import only. No live provider side effects. Review in BotFucker UI at 127.0.0.1:8765.

parameters.content:
Provider boundary notes:
- n8n fetches mail.
- BotFucker imports bounded JSON into local SQLite.
- No send/move/delete/archive/provider-list changes happen here.
- Run the UI separately: python3 -m botfucker.local_ui --db botfucker_review.sqlite3
